summary: Aligned Mava's account of Iru and "Nushi" with the provided Chapter 5 boundary and added a minimal night beat so the ending hands off cleanly into the next chapter's setup.
edits: Changed Mava's sister references from Nima to Iru and matched the road-death detail to the boundary context.
Adjusted the explanation of "Nushi" so it reads as an old valley word Iru used for Mava and as a term Mava can still let slip with Ori.
Added a single sleep-line of Asha saying "Nushi" to strengthen the Chapter 4 to Chapter 5 transition.
